connection: Fancy Brigades, Comics, Wench Brigades, and String Bands are the four official divisions of Philadelphia's Mummers Parade on New Year's Day. Drum is not a Mummers category — those sequined brigades march without a drum corps division.
hints: The connection is about a famous Philadelphia New Year's Day tradition.
Think about the Mummers Parade on Broad Street.
Four of these are official divisions of the annual Mummers Parade.
One sounds like it belongs in a parade but isn't a Mummers category — there is no drum corps division.
